name: Pinwheels
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cream cheese, sour cream, garlic powder, chopped green chilies, and black olives.
2. Spread the mixture over the tortillas.
3. Roll up each tortilla.
4. Wrap each roll-up in plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
5. To serve, cut each roll-up into wheels.
6. Pass salsa for dipping.
